cover.title: 测试完整流程
cover.image_prompt: A test cover image with a glowing AI emblem on dark background. Cinematic lighting, 8K resolution.

hook.text: Fable 5 大幅提升了代码能力，可以自主运行数小时。
hook.visual_effect: 标题从屏幕中心逐渐放大出现

scenes.title: 开场钩子
scenes.narration: Fable 5 大幅提升了代码能力，可以自主运行数小时。
scenes.video_prompt: A cinematic medium shot of a glowing Fable 5 emblem with camera dolly-in. Blue volumetric lighting. Slow motion particles.
scenes.image_prompt: A glowing Fable 5 emblem centered with dark background. Cinematic blue lighting, 8K resolution.

scenes.title: Stripe案例
scenes.narration: 它完成了 Stripe 五千万行代码的迁移，仅用了短短一天。
scenes.video_prompt: A dolly-in close-up of flowing code with digital particles. Camera pan right tracking code lines. Cyan neon lighting.
scenes.image_prompt: Flowing code on dark background with cyan highlight. Cinematic lighting, 8K quality.

scenes.title: 自主运行
scenes.narration: 它还自主运行了九个小时，生成了子 Agent 完成了复杂的任务。
scenes.video_prompt: A wide shot of a futuristic timeline with camera tracking right. Agent nodes branching out. Warm amber lighting.
scenes.image_prompt: Timeline visualization with branching agent nodes. Warm amber color scheme, cinematic style.

scenes.title: 总结
scenes.narration: 这就是 Fable 5 的能力，一个真正能自主工作的AI模型。
scenes.video_prompt: A slow orbit around a glowing Fable 5 emblem. Camera steady. Soft volumetric light. Deep blue atmosphere.
scenes.image_prompt: Fable 5 emblem floating in dark space. Cinematic CG render, 8K resolution.

scenes.title: 结尾
scenes.narration: 这就是 Fable 5 的强大之处，点个关注下期见。
scenes.video_prompt: A static wide shot of a brand end card with channel logo. Professional YouTube end card style.
scenes.image_prompt: Channel end card with logo and subscribe button. Dark background, clean typography.

outro.text: 这就是 Fable 5 的强大之处，点个关注下期见。
outro.visual_description: 品牌结尾卡包含Logo和关注按钮
outro.image_prompt: Channel end card with logo and subscribe button. Dark background, clean typography, 8K quality.
